transcript.text:
[A percentage of the advertising revenue will be donated to a child welfare institution to support children in need of help]
Hello everyone
I am here at Garosu-gil today
Since I mostly eat meat for mukbang,
the advertiser told me to try some pasta this time. I haven't had it for a while
I heard that the restaurant is a very hot place, where a lot of celebrities often come visit as well [Palette Hannam, Garosu-gil branch]
[Hot Place] [A pasta restaurant, where you have to wait in line]
I feel like it's been a while being in a city
[The city view does not match with her somehow]
Here's the menu
Thank you
You can order as much as you want
Thank you very much
She said I can eat as much as I want
Let's take a look
Wow, they have yukhoe (Korean steak tartare) pasta

Isn't it the omelette that explodes?
They only sell 30 dishes of daechang-deopbap a day. Not sure if it's available for today
Is this available?
Yes, it is. Oh really?
So, 1 order of palette pasta,
1 order of truffle pasta,
1 order of yukhoe pasta
1 order of omurice
Wow, there are different kinds of Ade
If you like something refreshing, try one of these two
Can I just do all 3 of them?
That's even better for us
Then, all 3 of them please.
For sure!
Thank you very much
[Black truffle pasta]

[Palette pasta]
[Perilla oil yukhoe pasta]
Thank you
Thanks again
It's so good
[Daechang-deopbap (Grilled beef large intestine with rice)]
You have to mix everything to fully enjoy the dish
Thank you
Is this the original portion of yukhoe? Yes!
Thank you
For this omelette, cut it with a knife from top to bottom and split in half
I need to do it right away
Looks so yummy
Bon appetit!
Which one should I eat first
I'll start with the regular pasta

It's their signature dish
A yolk
[She drank the soup already]
What a fancy way of eating noodles
I normally slurp my noodles
I was expecting a little bit of spiciness because it's reddish
It tastes very cheesy, creamy, and rich
I've never had pasta with a such flavor
Thank you
Yay I got a refill
Let's try the truffle pasta
It looks tasty
It looks like jajangmyeon
Let's try it
This is the strongest truffle scent I've ever smelled
It has a very strong truffle scent

It tastes sweet and salty at the same time
This Ade looks special
It's good
A yolk, (crack!)
(Veggie, out) I don't like greens
Yukhoe bibimmyeon was pretty interesting, but this yukhoe pasta is very unique
First time trying cold pasta! It's cold, but tasty
Every dish here tastes very new to me, so it's hard to describe the taste
It's pasta, but it's not
Let's try the omurice (Japanese omelette rice)
Oh no
Half of it is creamy sauce and the other half is curry
Let me try with the cream first
The omelette is amazing
seriously!
The taste of the omelette is totally different from that of a typical omelette

Oh no
Don't you slip, don't slip!
[Not letting that happen]
I would say that the texture is puffy -ish
It melted in my mouth
So this is the daechang-deopbap, which they sell only 30 dishes a day
With a scoop of rice
Dip the daechang in the yolk and put it on top of the scoop
A little bit of wasabi. I learned my lesson from the previous Hanwoo mukbang.
This much
No wonder this is very popular. It's really tasty
It goes very well with the yolk. I want more yolk
Can I actually order more?
Yummy
The yukhoe pasta will be nice to have in summer
because it's cold!

The taste is totally different from the typical pasta dishes such as tomato, rosé, cream, and oil pasta
When I first saw the palette pasta, I thought it would be similar to rosé pasta
But I realized that the taste is totally different
It's literally straight cheese pasta
Oops, it's getting hard
Should I just mix the whole thing
So tasty
You know what? I'm just going to mix it
[On my own way]
Put a little wasabi on top. It's really good with wasabi
The daechang is so tasty
And a sip of the soup makes it perfect
Absolutely amazing
It's hard to twirl it
I can't handle such fancy way of eating because I only eat meat
I give up

It's been so long since I had Western food like this
I've been only eating stuff like Korean barbeque everyday
This curry omg
It tastes similar to the curry I had in India
It tastes like Nasigoreng (Indonesian fried rice)
I've barely had omurice in my life because I don't like ketchup
Oh well, the egg was cooked differently tho
The omelette is even more amazing because it's soft
[Broth refill]
Thank you
That is your sixth refill
I've asked for a refill six times already
Oops, it's hot
Let's finish this one first
Why is it super quiet here?
Don't you like it better if it's quiet? I'm sorry?

Isn't it better for you when there's no other customers around?
Oh, yeah definitely. I was just saying because it got really quiet all of a sudden
You are almost done!
Actually, not yet
Please enjoy and let us know if you want more broth. We have plenty
Oh then, may I please? For sure, I'll give you a refill
Do you like the fried rice even though it has lots of veggies?
[Refill]
I know that you don't like vegetables
Yeah but it's still good
I guess that they ran out of bowl
To be honest, that's a salad bowl
Haha really?
A salad bowl?
I used all the bowls lol
I'm clumsy with this. I would rather use chopsticks and slurp it

Oh no
[chuging down the broth]
If you have a tumbler, I'll give you some more broth to take home
LOL
It's fine. Thank you tho
Let's put some broth in here
On top of a scoop of rice,
put daechang
I should've finished this first
It's still tasty even though it's cold
I saved this huge piece of daechang to eat it later
I haven't had western food for a long time
The taste of each dish was very unique that I've never had such thing before
If you like something special and curious about it, please come visit this restaurant!
Thank you, everyone!
